reviews.comment:
NO RECOMENDABLE LAS ENSALADAS CON POLLO!! Restos grasosos de pollo hervido! Sándwich envasados de ternera tampoco son ricos! Solo los sándwich de fiambre y hechos en el momento zafan

(Translated by Google)
NOT RECOMMENDED: SALADS WITH CHICKEN!! Greasy leftover boiled chicken! Packaged beef sandwiches aren't good either! Only the cold cuts sandwiches made fresh are decent.

reviews.comment:
El bar: excelente emparedado de Jamón crudo con pan y manteca. Es volver a mí niñez. Ahora, no entregan factura y cuidado con el vuelto.

(Translated by Google)
The bar: excellent prosciutto sandwich with bread and butter. It's like stepping back into my childhood. However, they don't give receipts, so be careful with the change.
